title: marketing — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by MarketingServiceProvider::boot(). All rules are used both by the observer chain (for authoritative refusal on write) AND by FormRequest data classes (for early request-time validation with clear error surfaces).

rules.name: valid_event_type
rules.description: Value is one of the 25+ marketing event types: signup / trial_started / trial_ended / trial_converted / subscription_started / subscription_upgraded / subscription_downgraded / subscription_cancelled / membership_purchased / lead_captured / session_booked / event_registered / athlete_enrolled / athlete_withdrawn / cart_abandoned / churn_predicted / referral_completed / refund_issued / chargeback_filed / feature_used_high_value / demo_scheduled / demo_attended / newsletter_subscribed / newsletter_unsubscribed / contact_form_submitted / app_install. Backed by the MarketingEventType enum cast + data/event-type-catalog.json.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid marketing event type. See data/event-type-catalog.json for the full list.

rules.name: valid_provider
rules.description: Value is one of the 9 supported provider slugs: meta_capi / google_ads / google_analytics_4 / gtm_server / tiktok_events / linkedin_insight / snapchat_capi / pinterest_capi / custom_webhook. Backed by the MarketingProvider enum cast.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: meta_capi, google_ads, google_analytics_4, gtm_server, tiktok_events, linkedin_insight, snapchat_capi, pinterest_capi, custom_webhook.

rules.name: valid_currency
rules.description: ISO 4217 3-letter uppercase currency code. Skipped when value_amount_cents is null (currency is only required for revenue events).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP).

rules.name: valid_positive_amount
rules.description: value_amount_cents is a non-negative integer when set. Refund + chargeback events allow negative values (they represent revenue reversal).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be non-negative (or negative for refund/chargeback event types).

rules.name: valid_attribution_snapshot_shape
rules.description: attribution jsonb matches the shape: { utm_source?, utm_medium?, utm_campaign?, utm_content?, utm_term?, gclid?, fbclid?, ttclid?, msclkid?, sccid?, first_touch_at?, last_touch_at?, landing_page?, referrer?, session_id? }. Every field optional; empty object {} allowed (server-side signup with no cookies). Validated against schemas/attribution-snapshot.embed.json (embedded in marketing-event.schema.json).
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid attribution snapshot.

rules.name: valid_consent_snapshot_shape
rules.description: consent_snapshot jsonb matches the shape: { marketing: boolean, advertising: boolean, personalized_advertising: boolean, recorded_at: ISO 8601 }. Every field required.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid consent snapshot.

rules.name: valid_deduplication_key
rules.description: String, 1-128 characters, alphanumeric + underscores + dashes only. Uniqueness enforced by DB composite index (tenant_id, deduplication_key) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — this rule enforces shape only.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be 1-128 alphanumeric characters (underscores + dashes allowed).

rules.name: valid_provider_config_shape
rules.description: config jsonb validates against the per-provider JSON Schema in data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json. Meta CAPI: pixel_id + access_token. Google Ads: customer_id + api_key + conversion_action_id. GA4: measurement_id + api_secret. GTM Server: webhook_url + hmac_secret. TikTok: pixel_code + access_token. LinkedIn: conversion_urn + oauth_token. Snapchat: pixel_id + access_token. Pinterest: ad_account_id + oauth_token. Custom Webhook: url + hmac_secret.
rules.default_message: The provider config does not match the schema for the ':provider' provider. Missing required fields: :missing_fields.

rules.name: valid_test_event_code
rules.description: When provider = meta_capi AND test_mode = true: test_event_code must match ^TEST[0-9]+$ (Meta's format). Skipped for other providers (they don't use test_event_code).
rules.default_message: The Meta CAPI test event code must match TEST[0-9]+ (e.g. TEST12345).

rules.name: valid_circuit_breaker_config
rules.description: circuit_breaker_config jsonb matches the shape: { failure_threshold: int [1, 100], open_duration_seconds: int [60, 86400], half_open_test_events: int [1, 5] }.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid circuit-breaker configuration.

rules.name: valid_retry_config
rules.description: retry_config jsonb matches: { max_attempts: int [1, 10], backoff_seconds: int[] with length = max_attempts AND every value in [1, 86400] AND monotonically non-decreasing }.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid retry configuration. backoff_seconds must have exactly max_attempts entries + be non-decreasing.

rules.name: valid_enabled_event_types
rules.description: enabled_event_types is a non-empty jsonb array AND every element is a valid MarketingEventType AND every element is in the provider's supports() list (per data/provider-capability-matrix.json — e.g. LinkedIn Insight does not support 'refund_issued').
rules.default_message: One or more event types in :attribute are not supported by the ':provider' provider. See data/provider-capability-matrix.json.
